title: synthia.yaml
description: Configuration for `synthia run` — Synthia agent evals in CI.

entrypoint.description: Path to the module exporting your RolloutAgent — (transcript, sandbox) => reply. Optional '#exportName' suffix; default picks `agent` then the default export. TS needs Node >= 22.18 or a dev install of tsx.

meta.description: Free-form agent identity (name, version, model) recorded on every rollout.

dataset.description: Dataset id to run. Strongly recommended in CI; omitted = the account's latest dataset (warned).

repeats.description: Run each scenario N times; pass rates pool across repeats (stochasticity tolerance).

pass_rate.description: Suite gate: fail when passed/evaluated drops below this. Required unless your organization's config sets a default. Org floors are applied with a warning.

min_scenarios.description: Fail when fewer rollouts were evaluated — guards a vacuous pass on an empty dataset.

branch.description: Compare against the newest succeeded CI run on this branch (populate it by also triggering your workflow on pushes to it).

max_regression.description: Fail when pass rate drops more than this vs the baseline; null = deltas are informational only.

enabled.description: Scrub secret-shaped strings from replies and tool events before upload. Disabling is explicit and warned.

patterns.description: Extra regexes to scrub, e.g. an internal token prefix.

output.description: Results JSON path (scores and metadata only — never transcripts).
